notes: Harvard Nutrition Source page on collagen; supports skin elasticity and joint pain benefits but raises important caveats: most research is industry-funded, potential heavy metal contamination in some products, and gut lining claim is NOT discussed — that claim should be removed or separately sourced

2025 npj Aging study (ETH Zürich): specific collagen amino acid ratio reduces biological age by 1.4 years in humans over 6 months; extends healthspan in C. elegans and improves grip strength in aged mice
